channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: How a Korean War bedrest trial led to the rise of evidence-based medicine
item.description: In 1959, young doctor David Sackett discovered a clinical trial that would transform medicine. The study challenged conventional bedrest practices.

item.title: Syncope risk scores may help identify low-risk adults in emergency settings
item.description: The Canadian Syncope Risk Score and FAINT score effectively identify adult ED patients with low risk of serious outcomes after fainting.

item.title: Cost-Saving Tips From an Efficiency Expert
10 Ways to Lower Prescription and Treatment Costs
item.description: Healthcare costs are at record highs. Follow these steps to maximize the value of every dollar you spend on medical care.
